rag_rules: Fix AGREE type errors by resolving unresolved identifiers or invalid helpers in the same annex, not by modifying AADL structure.
generic_rules: Ensure all symbols in AGREE expressions are visibly declared within the same annex scope.
Prefer deleting invalid clauses over adding architectural elements when type errors occur.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE expressions must reference only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new components, connections, or properties to fix AGREE type errors.
